title: mega-bench-reporter skills registry
description: Machine-readable index of the repo's agent skills. One entry per skills/<id>/ directory; CI keeps the two in sync. Descriptions live in each SKILL.md's frontmatter, never here.

id.description: Directory name under skills/; must equal the SKILL.md frontmatter name

kind.description: contract = consumed continuously (data/API semantics); runbook = executed step-by-step with verification gates

audience.description: Who is expected to follow this skill

platform.description: Where the skill's instructions can actually be executed

requires.description: Host-provisioned tools the skill assumes; omit when none beyond the repo itself
